# <div><br><br></div>

## Context

## Content
<div><br><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>An extensive Excel sheet is needed to track jobs, employees, orders, hardware receipts, and other documents. The goal is to digitize and organize all information, eliminating the need for physical paper records.</div>
